title: docs/tutorials: update
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Update tutorials to not expect `buildah run` to do anything if it isn't given a command to run.  In some cases (including when we need to listen for incoming connections when we might well not be root) this means we use `podman run` instead.

Try to avoid using the terms container and image as though they're interchangeable, which just creates confusion.

#### How to verify it

Run all of the examples in the tutorials.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #3564.
Removes a mysterious message that snuck in as part of #1303.
Fixes a "locking" in an error message that should have been "unlocking"
Fixes a typo that snuck past review in #3611.

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

~This took forever.  I hate everything.~

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
"buildah config" no longer prints "--------------->" when the --onbuild flag is used.
"buildah build" now fails with an error if you try to use both the "--manifest" and "-t" options at the same time.
```

comments.body:
You changed more the docs here, so I removed [CI:DOCS] Flag, should push it through CI again.

LGTM
A handful of nits, otherwise LGTM.  Thanks for running with this @nalind!
